code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
CRITICAL 4 vs 5 REFINEMENTS:
- Context-specific praise ("if you like X", "for Y group") -> 4
- Single-use/demonstration praise ("first use", "so far") without long-term verification -> 4
- Durability concerns ("wears out", "not stay new") -> 4
- Core excellence + replaceable part issue -> 5
- Explicit "perfect" without qualifiers -> 5
- Multi-aspect excellence (looks/works/durable) -> 5

BOUNDARY GUIDELINES:
- "Basic/adequate" performance praise -> 4
- Functional limitations (even minor) -> 4
- "Great for decoration only" -> 4
- Emotional endorsement ("love", "best") without limitations -> 5
- "Better than expected" performance -> 5
- Long-term verification (>6 months) -> 5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (1★ - Failure):
Review: Melted in dishwasher. Unusable after first cycle.
Rating: 1

Example 2 (3★ - Functional limitation):
Review: Too rough for comfort. Great as decorative throw only.
Rating: 3

Example 3 (4★ - Context-specific):
Review: Perfect for kids' use. Wipes clean but doesn't stay new looking.
Rating: 4

Example 4 (4★ - Durability):
Review: Love these baskets! Tore when carrying heavy items despite good design.
Rating: 4

Example 5 (4★ - Single-use):
Review: First use cleaned well! Easy after learning buttons. Will update after long-term testing.
Rating: 4

Example 6 (5★ - Core excellence):
Review: Replace lids occasionally but glass containers remain perfect after years!
Rating: 5

Example 7 (5★ - Multi-aspect):
Review: Beautiful, functional, and durable. Exceeded all expectations.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
